'''zayaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcrest|headcrest]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcrest|headcrest]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zayaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæyæzæth|zæyæzæth]] || [[word:zæyæzæj|zæyæzæj]] || [[word:zæyæzæsh|zæyæzæsh]] || [[word:zæyæzæ|zæyæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zayayazath|zayayazath]] || [[word:zayayazaj|zayayazaj]] || [[word:zayayazash|zayayazash]] || [[word:zayayaza|zayayaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zayazath|zayazath]] || [[word:zayazaj|zayazaj]] || [[word:zayazash|zayazash]] || [[word:zayaza|zayaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zayafzath|zayafzath]] || [[word:zayafzaj|zayafzaj]] || [[word:zayafzash|zayafzash]] || [[word:zayafzaf|zayafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zayazatha|zayazatha]] || [[word:zayazaja|zayazaja]] || [[word:zayazasha|zayazasha]] || [[word:zayazaka|zayazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zayazath|zayazath]] || [[word:zayazaj|zayazaj]] || [[word:zayazash|zayazash]] || [[word:zayaza|zayaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zayazathal|zayazathal]] || [[word:zayazajal|zayazajal]] || [[word:zayazashal|zayazashal]] || [[word:zayazakal|zayazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zayazathatha|zayazathatha]] || [[word:zayazajaja|zayazajaja]] || [[word:zayazashasha|zayazashasha]] || [[word:zayazaka|zayazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zayazathan|zayazathan]] || [[word:zayazajan|zayazajan]] || [[word:zayazashan|zayazashan]] || [[word:zayazakan|zayazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zayazathaoro|zayazathaoro]] || [[word:zayazajaoro|zayazajaoro]] || [[word:zayazashaoro|zayazashaoro]] || [[word:zayazakaoro|zayazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
